description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs only on the develop and production branches and executes the command `echo run tests in this section`. Add a step-deploy-prod job in the deploy stage, limited to the production branch, marked as manual, and targeting the production environment. In that job run the commands `sudo apt-get install -y python3-pip`, `sudo pip3 install --upgrade setuptools`, `sudo pip3 install docker-compose`, `sudo docker image prune -f`, `docker-compose build --no-cache`, and `docker-compose up -d`.
